name: openhands
tagline: Delegates coding tasks to the OpenHands CLI in headless mode across any LiteLLM-supported model provider.
verdict: Strong, safety-conscious reference: exact flags verified against --help, documented pitfalls, a defined JSON event output contract, and explicit exclusions pointing to sibling skills. Only real gap is an unpinned 'uv tool install openhands' version.

highlights.summary: `uv tool install openhands --python 3.12` has no version pin (official index, but unpinned).
